emailQuality.description: Points for verified email addresses found on the domain

founderMatch.description: Points for identified founders or decision-makers (P0 contacts)

dataCoverage.description: Bonus for domain having an active MX record (email server confirmed)

techStack.description: Points for detected technology stack items, with bonus for ICP-relevant technologies

p0Detection.description: Rules for identifying decision-makers (P0 contacts). C-level titles auto-qualify. VP/Director qualify if their department matches revenueDepartments.
